ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snowfall_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each snowfall record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for the record */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the snowfall measurement period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the snowfall measurement period */,
  "snowfall_inches" REAL /* Total snowfall measured in inches */,
  "normal_inches" REAL /* Normal snowfall for the period in inches */,
  "departure_inches" REAL /* Difference between measured snowfall and normal snowfall */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the snowfall data */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the measurement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the snowfall record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snowfall_records_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "normal_snowfall" (
  "normal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each normal snowfall record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for the normal record */,
  "average_snowfall_inches" REAL /* Average normal snowfall in inches */,
  "year_range" TEXT /* Range of years over which the average snowfall is calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the normal snowfall data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("normal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_normal_snowfall_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snowfall_departures" (
  "departure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each departure record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the snowfall record for which departure is calculated */,
  "departure_inches" REAL /* Measured departure from normal snowfall in inches */,
  "calculated_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user or system that calculated the departure */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the departure was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("departure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snowfall_departures_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES snowfall_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snowfall_departures_calculated_by FOREIGN KEY ("calculated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snowfall_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for the ranking */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the location based on snowfall (lower is less snowy) */,
  "rank_date" TEXT /* Date the ranking was calculated */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period over which the ranking is calculated */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snowfall_rankings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_snowfall_inches" REAL /* Predicted snowfall in inches */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was issued */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., snowfall, blizzard warning) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the alert */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical measure */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for the statistics */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "average_snowfall" REAL /* Average snowfall measured in that year */,
  "total_snowfall" REAL /* Total snowfall measured in that year */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the statistics */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the statistical measures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for the historical data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical record */,
  "snowfall_inches" REAL /* Snowfall measured in inches for that year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., meteorologist, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission granted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
